## Sources

<!--
For lyrics: official YouTube URL + timestamp.
For lore or character facts: official upload / Patreon comic page / VIVINOS post.
Fanmade reuploads and pure speculation are not accepted as sources.
Speculation is fine as *content* if it is clearly labelled as such.
-->

- [ ] Official source(s) linked above
- [ ] Speculation, if any, is labelled "community reading" / "fan theory"
- [ ] Character names and song titles match the spelling used on the official uploads
